reason: Verified that the agent can execute browser commands and report page titles correctly
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent home with three agents in the sidebar and main content area
Found and clicked on agent "QA-20260428-165641-tnw1" in the main content area — Agent chat page opened, showing the agent name, idle status, and empty chat input field
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the input field — Message appeared in the input field, ready to send
Pressed Cmd+Enter to send the message — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", session created with "New Session" label
Waited up to 3 minutes for response using browser_wait_for with text "Example Domain" — Response received within 8 seconds, agent executed two browser operations and returned result
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states "The page title is Example Domain." with working browser preview panel on right side showing the actual page
